title: Part 4 – Key Word Transformation
instruction: Complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given.

questions.sentence1: Thomas spoke so quickly I had difficulty understanding him.
questions.formula: find it + adjective + to-infinitive
questions.explanation: find it + adj + to-inf = thấy khó làm gì. 'Found it difficult to understand' = tôi thấy khó hiểu anh ta.

questions.sentence1: They've postponed the match and it'll be played next weekend.
questions.formula: have/has been + past participle (passive present perfect) | put off = postpone
questions.explanation: Passive present perfect: has been + V3. Put off = hoãn lại. The match has been put off.

questions.sentence1: I'm never going to speak to Louis again.
questions.formula: have no intention of + V-ing
questions.explanation: have no intention of + V-ing = không có ý định làm gì. I've got no intention of (ever) speaking to Louis again.

questions.sentence1: It seems certain that lightning started the forest fire.
questions.formula: must have been + past participle (passive deduction about the past)
questions.explanation: must have been + V3 = suy luận chắc chắn về quá khứ (bị động). Must have been started by lightning.

questions.sentence1: It wasn't worth going to the market because it was closing.
questions.formula: there is/was no point in + V-ing = không có ích gì khi làm
questions.explanation: there was no point in + V-ing = không đáng / vô ích. There was no point in going there.

questions.sentence1: We phoned the restaurant, but they said booking a table wasn't necessary.
questions.sentence2Start: We phoned the restaurant, but they said we
questions.formula: didn't have to + bare infinitive = không cần phải (không bắt buộc)
questions.explanation: didn't have to + V = không cần phải. Didn't have to book = không cần đặt bàn.

questions.sentence1: 'I'll take you to the station if you're ready,' my brother said.
questions.sentence2Start: My brother said he'd take me to the station
questions.formula: as/so long as + clause = miễn là, với điều kiện là
questions.explanation: As/so long as = if (provided that). Reported speech: are → was. As long as I was ready.

questions.sentence1: My bike needs repairing again.
questions.formula: get + object + past participle (causative)
questions.explanation: get + object + V3 = nhờ/thuê người làm gì. Get my bike repaired = đem xe đi sửa.

questions.sentence1: The firm said profits had fallen on account of the recession.
questions.formula: blame something for + noun phrase
questions.explanation: blame X for Y = đổ lỗi X vì Y. The fall in profits = sự sụt giảm lợi nhuận (danh từ hóa). Blamed the recession for the fall in profits.

questions.sentence1: Sigourney regretted spending so much in the shops.
questions.formula: wish + (that) + S + past perfect = tiếc về quá khứ
questions.explanation: wish + past perfect = tiếc về quá khứ. Wished (that) she had/she'd spent less = ước mình đã tiêu ít hơn.

questions.sentence1: People believe that poem was written about these beautiful hills.
questions.formula: is/are believed/said/thought + to have been + past participle
questions.explanation: Passive reporting verb: is believed to have been + V3. That poem is believed to have been written.

questions.sentence1: Without your help, I wouldn't have finished the job.
questions.sentence2Start: I wouldn't have finished the job if
questions.formula: if it had not been for + noun = if not for (third conditional variant)
questions.explanation: If it had not been for = nếu không có. Cấu trúc thay thế cho Without trong third conditional.

questions.sentence1: The storm left very few trees standing.
questions.formula: Hardly any + noun + were + past participle
questions.explanation: Hardly any = very few. Hardly any trees were left (still standing) after the storm.

questions.sentence1: 'What's the height of that building?' I asked the guide.
questions.formula: indirect question: ask + how + adjective + subject + verb
questions.explanation: 'What's the height' → how high. Reported question không đảo ngữ: how high that building was.

questions.sentence1: The new printer is very similar to the old model.
questions.sentence2End: the new printer and the old model.
questions.formula: there is not much difference between X and Y
questions.explanation: not much difference between = rất giống nhau. There is not much difference between the new printer and the old model.

questions.sentence1: Simon wouldn't apologise for being so rude.
questions.formula: refuse to say (that) + subject + was sorry
questions.explanation: apologise = say (that) you are/were sorry. Refused to say (that) he was sorry = từ chối xin lỗi.

questions.sentence1: What attracts people so much to this city is its nightlife.
questions.formula: what people find (so) attractive about X = what attracts people to X
questions.explanation: What attracts people to X → What people find (so) attractive about X. Đảo: find + adj + about.

questions.sentence1: It's unlikely our firm will manage to win the contract.
questions.formula: succeed in + V-ing = thành công trong việc
questions.explanation: succeed in + V-ing (NOT succeed to). Unlikely to succeed in winning the contract.

questions.sentence1: We haven't seen each other for two years.
questions.formula: It's been + time + since + past simple
questions.explanation: It's been + time + since = kể từ khi... đã... năm. It's been two years since we last saw each other.

questions.sentence1: 'You didn't tell me the truth, Emilio,' said Carmen.
questions.formula: accuse + person + of + (not) V-ing
questions.explanation: accuse someone of + V-ing. Not telling = phủ định gerund. Accused Emilio of not telling her the truth.

questions.sentence1: I really think you ought to arrive on time for the meeting.
questions.formula: advise + object + (not) + to-infinitive
questions.explanation: advise + O + not to + V. I strongly advise you not to be late for the meeting.

questions.sentence1: Even though we played badly we won the match.
questions.formula: in spite of + V-ing / noun phrase
questions.explanation: In spite of + V-ing. Even though + clause → In spite of + V-ing. In spite of (our) playing badly.

questions.sentence1: The flying time to Singapore is six hours.
questions.formula: it takes + time + to-infinitive
questions.explanation: It takes + time + to + V = mất bao lâu để làm gì. It takes six hours to fly to Singapore.

questions.sentence1: I didn't realise that the beach was so far from the campsite.
questions.sentence2End: long way from the beach to the campsite.
questions.formula: such a + adjective + noun (so + adjective → such a + adj + noun)
questions.explanation: so far → such a long way. such a + adj + noun thay thế so + adj. It was such a long way from the beach.

questions.sentence1: Amanda woke up late because she'd forgotten to set her alarm.
questions.sentence2Start: If Amanda hadn't forgotten to set her alarm she
questions.formula: third conditional: if + past perfect, would not have + past participle
questions.explanation: Third conditional: If + past perfect → would not have + V3. Wouldn't/would not have woken up late.

questions.sentence1: This Internet browser works far better than the others.
questions.formula: not nearly as + adverb + as = kém xa so với
questions.explanation: works far better than → don't work nearly as well as. Not nearly as well as = thua xa.

questions.sentence1: 'Can I borrow your phone for a minute, Jack?' asked Emma.
questions.formula: ask + person + whether + subject + could + verb + object
questions.explanation: Reported question với whether. Can → could. Your → his. Whether she could borrow his phone.

questions.sentence1: Raymond has so much skill as an artist that his drawings look like photographs.
questions.sentence2End: artist that his drawings look like photographs.
questions.formula: such a + adjective + noun (so much + noun → such a + adj + noun)
questions.explanation: so much skill → such a skilful/skillful/skilled. such a + adj + noun. Raymond is such a skilful artist that...

questions.sentence1: I wish I hadn't stayed up so late last night.
questions.formula: should have + past participle = lẽ ra phải làm (chỉ sự hối tiếc)
questions.explanation: should have + V3 = lẽ ra phải... I should have gone to bed earlier last night.

questions.sentence1: Our departure was delayed because another flight arrived late.
questions.formula: passive: was caused by + noun phrase
questions.explanation: Passive: was caused by + agent. The late arrival = sự đến muộn. Was caused by the late arrival of another flight.

questions.sentence1: 'Would you like to come to my party, Karen?', the girl said.
questions.formula: invite + person + to + noun (report an invitation)
questions.explanation: Would you like to come = invite. My → her (pronoun shift). The girl invited Karen to her party.

questions.sentence1: Two foolish people took no notice of the warning sign.
questions.formula: pay no attention to = take no notice of
questions.explanation: take no notice of = pay no attention to. Cả hai là collocation cố định với nghĩa bỏ qua, không để ý.

questions.sentence1: The rescue workers had too little food to feed everyone.
questions.sentence2End: the rescue workers to feed everyone.
questions.formula: there was not enough/sufficient + noun + for + person + to + V
questions.explanation: too little → not enough/sufficient. There was not enough food for the rescue workers to feed everyone.

questions.sentence1: Jack gets no exercise apart from walking to his car.
questions.formula: the only + noun + subject + verb + is + V-ing
questions.explanation: no exercise apart from → the only exercise... is. The only exercise Jack gets is walking to his car.

questions.sentence1: Sonia wanted to be a nurse so she left her job as a teacher.
questions.formula: give up + V-ing + to-infinitive (purpose)
questions.explanation: left her job as a teacher = gave up teaching. Give up + V-ing. To become = để trở thành. Gave up teaching to become a nurse.

questions.sentence1: There's far less noise in this street than there used to be.
questions.formula: not nearly as much + uncountable noun + as
questions.explanation: far less... than → not nearly as much... as. There isn't nearly as much noise as there used to be.
